# Hey, I'm Manuel 👋
Software developer from Lisbon 🇵🇹. At Critical Techworks I work on bringing Spotify into BMW cars, whatever needs solving. Outside of work I pick up personal projects, usually in whatever language I feel like at the time. Right now that's Kotlin. Big Linux fan 🐧.
